list.name: Medical Events
list.rawQuery: SELECT date::timestamptz as time, end_date::timestamptz as timeend, title as text, category || ' — ' || COALESCE(subcategory, '') || ': ' || COALESCE(description,'') as tags FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

description: Comprehensive health lab results dashboard — visualizes lab trends, reference ranges, medical events, and out-of-range results over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Total Lab Results" FROM lab_results
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Total Events" FROM events
SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' to ' || TO_CHAR(MAX(date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "Date Range" FROM lab_results
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Flagged Results" FROM lab_results WHERE flag IN ('H','L')
SELECT date as time, category || ': ' || title as "Event", category FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "WBC" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'WBC' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Hemoglobin" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Hemoglobin' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Platelets" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Platelets' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "RBC" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'RBC' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Glucose" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Glucose' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Creatinine" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Creatinine' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Sodium" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Sodium' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Potassium" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Potassium' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "ALT" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'ALT' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "AST" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'AST' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Alk Phos" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Alk Phos' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Total Bilirubin" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Total Bilirubin' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Total Cholesterol" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Total Cholesterol' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "HDL Cholesterol" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'HDL Cholesterol' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "LDL Cholesterol" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'LDL Cholesterol' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Triglycerides" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Triglycerides' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "CRP" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'CRP' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "ESR" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'ESR' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "TSH" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'TSH' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Free T4" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Free T4' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Free T3" FROM lab_results WHERE measurement = 'Free T3' AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date as time, value as "Value", measurement FROM lab_results WHERE measurement IN ($measurement) AND $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date

SELECT lr.date, lr.category, lr.measurement, lr.value, lr.unit, lr.flag, rr.reference_low, rr.reference_high FROM lab_results lr LEFT JOIN reference_ranges rr ON lr.measurement = rr.measurement WHERE lr.flag IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(lr.date) ORDER BY lr.date DESC

SELECT lr.date, lr.category, lr.measurement, lr.value, lr.unit, lr.flag, rr.reference_low, rr.reference_high FROM lab_results lr LEFT JOIN reference_ranges rr ON lr.measurement = rr.measurement WHERE $__timeFilter(lr.date) AND (lr.category IN ($category) OR '$category' = 'All') AND (lr.measurement IN ($measurement) OR '$measurement' = 'All') ORDER BY lr.date DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM lab_results ORDER BY category
list.label: Category
list.name: category
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM lab_results ORDER BY category

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT measurement FROM lab_results WHERE category IN ($category) ORDER BY measurement
list.label: Measurement
list.name: measurement
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT measurement FROM lab_results WHERE category IN ($category) ORDER BY measurement

title: Health Timeline
